opportunities.title: 移动电源 CCC 认证将新增安全测试要求
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察到明确的规则与标准变更（新增GB 47372—2026及更严格测试项），并给出硬性时间表（2027-04-01全面执行、存量证书需转换），将直接改变相关产品的准入与测试/认证成本与流程。

opportunities.title: Cloudflare Turnstile requiring fingerprintable WebGL
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable evidence indicates a real shift in practical web access requirements for some users (minority browser maintainer reports user impact; widespread discussion/engagement), but no clearly documented change in Cloudflare policy/product terms or measurable cost/latency/access improvements—primarily an exposed dependency/behavior with mitigations like spoofing mentioned.

opportunities.title: Dav2d
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signals include active community interest and concrete technical claims (AV2 decode complexity ~5× AV1; ~25% size reduction mentioned) implying materially higher compute requirements, but no demonstrated widely-available implementation, benchmarks, or market/access change is evidenced in the provided content.

opportunities.title: 研究称恶意网站可借 SSD 计时推测用户活动
opportunities.signal_reason: 可观察事实是出现了无需点击/安装即可在网页层面推断用户活动的攻击路径，并报告了较高准确率与可行实验结果；但当前仅在 Mac/Linux 验证、距离大规模实际利用与缓解措施落地仍有不确定性，尚未体现明确的成本/可用性变化或官方修复发布。

opportunities.title: 1-Bit Bonsai Image 4B Image Generation for Local Devices
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signal is a claimed capability shift toward running multi-billion-parameter image generation locally via 1-bit weights, aligning with clear demand for non-subscription, private/local inference; however, the discussion highlights uncertainty about real-world speed/latency gains versus primarily memory/storage benefits, limiting how clearly market conditions change from the information provided.

opportunities.title: Restartable Sequences
opportunities.signal_reason: Signals an established kernel feature and an existing support library (librseq) being discussed and referenced; no explicit new release, capability change, or market/access shift is evidenced beyond continued interest and awareness.

opportunities.title: Deflock hits 100k ALPRs Mapped in USA
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signals include a publicly available map/dataset and evidence of substantial ALPR prevalence plus active community attention, but there is no clear newly changed capability, access, cost, or market condition beyond increased visibility and incremental dataset iteration.

opportunities.title: The Website Specification
opportunities.signal_reason: Observable signal is mainly community attention to a guidance document (high engagement), but it does not indicate a new capability release, standard adoption, regulatory change, or measurable shift in cost/latency/access—just a curated set of recommendations.
